$schema_note: Manifest of InDesign templates the dashboard can drive. id is the URL/state key. label is the display name on the picker. file is the path relative to the repo root. tile_fields is the per-tile field set with named-frame patterns (the bridge code substitutes {N} -> 1..tile_count). page_fields is the page-level editable fields shown as text inputs in the edit stage. tile_count is NOT stored here — it's resolved at runtime by introspecting the template's named frames (see dashboard/lib/template-introspect.ts). All other named frames in the .indd file are considered static and are not exposed in the dashboard.

templates.label: Recently Leased IOS
templates.static_frames_note: Other named frames in this template (agent names patrick_sior/max_sior, contacts jack_contact/patrick_contact/max_contact, logo, company_info, declaration, decorative *_frame, tile_N tile-background frames) are static and not surfaced in the dashboard. The user manages them in InDesign directly.
